Year of Excellence

About Our Schoolआमच्या शाळेविषयी

Building Tomorrow's Leadersउद्याचे नेते घडवणे

Swami Vivekananda English Medium School, proudly celebrating its grand third year, is a beacon of holistic education in Kopargaon. Named after the great philosopher and reformer, we instil the values of knowledge, discipline, and compassion in every student.

We believe every child carries a spark of genius. Our mission is to nurture that spark through modern education, vedic wisdom, physical training, and character development — creating not just scholars, but well-rounded human beings.

🧠 Vedic + Modern

Blending ancient wisdom with contemporary education

🤖 AI Integrated

Artificial Intelligence included in the core syllabus

🥋 Physical Training

Karate, MMA, Yoga and sports for total fitness

🎯 IAS Preparation

Zero to UPSC Junior IAS Batch from Class 1

Our Key Features & Facilities

What Makes Us Differentआम्ही वेगळे का आहोत

A child-friendly, stress-free environment powered by experienced faculty, modern technology and a holistic curriculum.

✦
👩‍🏫

Trained & Friendly Faculty

Experienced, qualified teachers committed to nurturing each child's potential in a warm, supportive environment.

😊

Stress-Free Environment

Child-friendly campus designed to encourage curiosity, creativity and confidence without academic pressure.

🤖

AI in Syllabus

Artificial Intelligence concepts integrated into the curriculum, preparing students for a technology-driven future.

🔢

Vedic Mathematics

Vedic Maths & shortcut tricks for competitive exams — building calculation speed and analytical thinking.

🥋

MMA & Karate Training

Self-defense, discipline and physical fitness through MMA, Weapon Training and Karate classes for all students.

🧘

Yoga & Meditation

Daily yoga and meditation sessions for mental clarity, stress relief and overall physical and emotional wellbeing.

🎤

Stage Exposure

Regular public speaking, drama, singing and cultural programmes to build confidence and personality.

💻

E-Learning & Smart Teaching

Digital classrooms and smart teaching methods to make learning engaging, interactive and effective.

🏥

Regular Health Check-ups

Periodic health screenings to monitor students' growth and wellbeing throughout the academic year.

⚽

Sports & Games

Comprehensive sports programme including cricket, football, athletics and indoor games to build teamwork.

🎵

Singing & Cultural Programmes

Music, dance and cultural activities integrated into school life to celebrate India's rich heritage.

🏆

Competitive Exam Guidance

Structured coaching for competitive exams from early classes — building a strong foundation for future success.

Flagship Programme
तपस्या

Zero to UPSC — Junior IAS Batch 1.0

India's unique programme that prepares students for the IAS examination starting from Class 1 itself. A revolutionary approach to competitive exam readiness.

📋 Admissionप्रवेश 14 Mar 2026

Admissions Open for 2026–27 २०२६–२७ साठी प्रवेश सुरू

Enrolment is now open for all classes from Play Group to 10th Standard. Limited seats available. Apply before 31 May 2026. प्ले ग्रुप ते १०वी पर्यंत सर्व वर्गांसाठी प्रवेश सुरू झाले आहेत. मर्यादित जागा. ३१ मे २०२६ पूर्वी अर्ज करा.

🎯 TAPASYAतपस्या 10 Mar 2026

TAPASYA Batch 1.0 — Enrolment Open तपस्या बॅच १.० — नोंदणी खुली

Zero to UPSC Junior IAS Programme. Only for students who want to prepare for ALL competitive exams. Starting from Class 1. शून्य ते UPSC जूनियर IAS कार्यक्रम. फक्त सर्व स्पर्धा परीक्षांची तयारी करणाऱ्यांसाठी. पहिल्या इयत्तेपासून.

🤖 AI ProgrammeAI कार्यक्रम 01 Mar 2026

AI Integrated Syllabus Launched AI एकात्मिक अभ्यासक्रम सुरू

SVEMS is the first school in Kopargaon to offer AI-integrated education from Class 1. Vedic Maths, Coding, and Smart Learning included. कोपरगावातील पहिली शाळा जिथे पहिल्या इयत्तेपासून AI शिक्षण दिले जाते. वैदिक गणित, कोडिंग आणि स्मार्ट लर्निंग समाविष्ट.

Zero to UPSC Batch 1.0

Tapasya Programme · SVEMS · Jeur Patoda

10-Year UPSC Foundation Syllabus

Class 1 – 10  ·  Building IAS Mindset from an Early Age

If students are trained with UPSC-style thinking from the school level, it becomes much easier to develop analytical ability, leadership qualities, and awareness about society and governance.

📗 CLASS 1–4 · BASIC FOUNDATION
🎯 CLASS 5–8 · UPSC FOUNDATION
🚀 CLASS 9–10 · PRE-UPSC LEVEL
1
📗 FOUNDATION
Class 1 — Awareness Foundation
🎯 Basic understanding of the surrounding world.
Language Development
  • ◆Simple sentences (English / Hindi)
  • ◆My family, My school, My country
  • ◆Speaking 3–4 sentences from a picture
General Awareness
  • ◆National Flag of India
  • ◆National Emblem & National Anthem
  • ◆Major festivals of India
  • ◆Introduction to one's village/town
Basic Geography
  • ◆What is Earth
  • ◆Land, water, and sky
  • ◆Seasons
Moral Values
  • ◆Honesty
  • ◆Cleanliness
  • ◆Helping others
Thinking Skills
  • ◆Asking simple questions (What, Where, Who)
  • ◆Basic puzzles
2
📗 FOUNDATION
Class 2 — Introduction to India
🎯 Know your nation — map, rivers, people.
Language
  • ◆Sentences with 5–6 words
  • ◆Short paragraph writing
  • ◆Picture description
India Awareness
  • ◆Map of India
  • ◆National animal, bird, flower
  • ◆Major rivers (Ganga, Yamuna)
Geography Basics
  • ◆Mountains, rivers, forests
  • ◆Weather
Society
  • ◆Different professions
  • ◆Teacher, doctor, farmer, etc.
Logical Thinking
  • ◆Comparisons (big/small, long/short)
  • ◆Simple decision-making
3
📗 FOUNDATION
Class 3 — Society and Nature
🎯 History, geography and environment awareness.
Language
  • ◆Paragraph writing
  • ◆Writing about oneself
History Basics
  • ◆Ancient kings
  • ◆Freedom fighters — Mahatma Gandhi
Geography
  • ◆States and capitals of India
  • ◆Rivers and mountains
Environment
  • ◆Importance of trees
  • ◆Save water
Observation Skills
  • ◆Identifying maps
  • ◆Explaining simple information
4
📗 FOUNDATION
Class 4 — India and Constitution Basics
🎯 National leaders, constitution and citizenship.
Language
  • ◆Essay of 8–10 sentences
  • ◆Story narration
Indian History
  • ◆Freedom movement
  • ◆Important national leaders
Geography
  • ◆States of India
  • ◆Climate
Civics
  • ◆What is a constitution
  • ◆Duties of citizens
Ethics
  • ◆Good leadership
  • ◆Truth and courage
5
🎯 UPSC FOUNDATION
Class 5 — Beginning of UPSC Foundation
🎯 Ancient India, government and current affairs.
History
  • ◆Ancient India
  • ◆Indus Valley Civilization
Geography
  • ◆Structure of the Earth
  • ◆Continents and oceans
Civics
  • ◆What is government
  • ◆Panchayat system
Economy Basics
  • ◆Money
  • ◆Market
Current Awareness
  • ◆Two important news events per week
6
🎯 UPSC FOUNDATION
Class 6 — Analytical Learning
🎯 Empires, democracy, economy and environment.
History
  • ◆Maurya Empire
  • ◆Gupta Empire
Geography
  • ◆Map study
  • ◆Rivers of India
Civics
  • ◆Democracy
  • ◆Elections
Economy
  • ◆Agriculture
  • ◆Industry
Science Awareness
  • ◆Climate change
  • ◆Environmental protection
7
🎯 UPSC FOUNDATION
Class 7 — Understanding Governance
🎯 Parliament, judiciary, trade and natural resources.
History
  • ◆Medieval India
  • ◆Kingdoms and empires
Geography
  • ◆Natural resources
  • ◆Forests
Civics
  • ◆Parliament
  • ◆Judiciary
Economy
  • ◆Production
  • ◆Trade
Current Affairs
  • ◆Important national events
8
🎯 UPSC FOUNDATION
Class 8 — National Understanding
🎯 Modern India, constitution, banks and ethics.
History
  • ◆Modern India
  • ◆Freedom movement
Geography
  • ◆Indian economy and agriculture
Civics
  • ◆Constitution of India
  • ◆Fundamental Rights
Economy
  • ◆Banks
  • ◆Budget
Ethics
  • ◆Responsibility
  • ◆Social service
9
🚀 PRE-UPSC
Class 9 — Advanced UPSC Foundation
🎯 Detailed polity, GDP, space and urbanisation.
History
  • ◆Detailed study of the freedom struggle
Geography
  • ◆Resource management
  • ◆Urbanization
Polity
  • ◆Indian Constitution in detail
  • ◆Parliament and the President
Economy
  • ◆GDP
  • ◆Poverty
Science & Technology
  • ◆Space research (ISRO, satellites)
10
🚀 PRE-UPSC
Class 10 — Pre-UPSC Level
🎯 Complete preparation — history, polity, economy, IR, essay.
History
  • ◆Complete study of Modern India
Geography
  • ◆Maps of India and the world
Polity
  • ◆Complete overview of the Constitution
Economy
  • ◆Indian economy
  • ◆Government schemes
International Relations
  • ◆India's foreign relations
Ethics and Leadership
  • ◆Decision-making skills
  • ◆Administrative values
Essay Writing
  • ◆Social issues
  • ◆Environmental topics
Programme Outcomes
✅ Benefits of This Syllabus
🧠
UPSC-Style Thinking
Develops analytical mindset from Class 1 itself
📚
Strong General Knowledge
10 years of structured learning across all subjects
🔬
Analytical Ability
Critical reasoning and observation skills built year by year
🏆
Exam Ready
Competitive exam preparation becomes much easier in higher classes
What Makes Us Different

🏆 Salient Features🏆 वैशिष्ट्ये

🎯
🎯

Complete Exam Preparationसंपूर्ण परीक्षा तयारी

Scholarship to UPSC — all competitive exams. Navodaya, NMMS, Police, Talathi, MPSC, NDA, CBI, IB and full UPSC covered.Scholarship ते UPSC — सर्व स्पर्धा परीक्षा. Navodaya, NMMS, पोलीस, तलाठी, MPSC, NDA, CBI, IB आणि UPSC.

🤖
🤖

AI-Powered UPSC EvaluationAI-आधारित UPSC मूल्यांकन

Every written answer evaluated on UPSC pattern by AI. Exact marks, detailed feedback, and improvement suggestions instantly.प्रत्येक उत्तराचे AI द्वारे UPSC पॅटर्ननुसार मूल्यांकन. अचूक गुण, सविस्तर अभिप्राय मिळतात.

💻
💻

Annual Coding Languageवार्षिक Coding भाषा

Every year one new language: Web Design → C → C++/C# → JavaScript → Python. 21st century skills.दरवर्षी एक नवीन भाषा: Web Design → C → C++/C# → JavaScript → Python. 21व्या शतकासाठी कौशल्ये.

🥋
🥋

MMA + Weapon TrainingMMA + शस्र विद्या

Mixed Martial Arts (Boxing, Karate) and Weapon Training. Physical fitness and defence skills for NDA / Police aspirants.Mixed Martial Arts (Boxing, Karate) आणि शस्र विद्या. NDA / पोलीस इच्छुकांसाठी शारीरिक तंदुरुस्ती.

📚
📚

Free Books + Weekly Testsमोफत पुस्तके + साप्ताहिक चाचणी

Almost all books free. Weekly and monthly tests. UPSC pattern mock tests with detailed AI performance analysis reports.जवळजवळ सर्व पुस्तके मोफत. साप्ताहिक व मासिक चाचणी. UPSC पॅटर्नची Mock Tests सविस्तर AI विश्लेषणासह.

⭐
⭐

Only 5 Seats — Elite Batchफक्त 5 जागा — Elite Batch

Strictly 5 students only — existing school students. No new admissions. Personal attention, customised pace, zero compromise.फक्त 5 विद्यार्थी — केवळ शाळेतील. नवीन प्रवेश नाही. वैयक्तिक लक्ष, सानुकूलित गती.

Before Applying

✅ Eligibility Criteria — पात्रता✅ पात्रता निकष

🏫
Must be a current student of this school only. No new admissions.
विद्यार्थी याच शाळेतील असावा. नवीन विद्यार्थ्यांना प्रवेश नाही. फक्त 5 विद्यार्थ्यांना प्रवेश.
📖
Student must be able to read and write independently.
विद्यार्थ्याला लिहिता वाचता आले पाहिजे.
📅
Must attend school regularly and study consistently every day.
विद्यार्थी नियमित शाळेत येणारा असावा. व नियमित अभ्यास करणारा असावा.
💰
Parents must have capacity to purchase some books if required.
यासाठी जवळजवळ सर्व पुस्तके मोफत आहेत. तरीही काही पुस्तके विकत घ्यावी लागू शकतात.
📱
Student must have Android Mobile or Laptop for software training.
विद्यार्थ्याला Android Mobile किंवा Laptop ची गरज लागेल. हे घ्यायची पालकाची क्षमता असावी.
🥊
Must have capacity to withstand physical training (MMA injuries possible).
MMA ट्रेनिंग मध्ये दुखापत होऊ शकते. ते सहन करण्याची क्षमता असावी.

⚠️ Parents must read all the above points carefully. Only enroll in this batch if fully prepared for everything mentioned above. ⚠️ पालकांनी वरील सर्व बाबी बारकाईने वाचाव्यात. सर्व गोष्टींची तयारी असेल तरच या बॅचला प्रवेश घ्यावा.

Programme Structure

📋 Two-Part Programme — वैशिष्ट्ये📋 दोन भागांचा कार्यक्रम

A
Part 1 — Foundation Examsभाग 1 — मूलभूत परीक्षा
Basic to Intermediate Level
1.
Scholarship, Navodaya, NMMS
2.
Police Bharti, Talathi Bharti, Gram Sevak Bharti इत्यादी
3.
UPSC/MPSC — मराठी, हिंदी, गणित, बुद्धिमत्ता, General Studies (सोपा भाग)
B
Part 2 — Advanced Examsभाग 2 — उच्च दर्जाच्या परीक्षा
Advanced & National Level
4.
NDA — राष्ट्रीय संरक्षण प्रबोधिनी
5.
ED — Enforcement Directorate Officer
6.
CBI — केंद्रीय पोलीस अधिकारी
7.
IB — Intelligence Bureau (गुप्तचर खाते)
8.
UPSC/MPSC अवघड भाग, दीर्घोत्तरी उत्तर लेखन, निबंध लेखन (1200 शब्दात)
Complete Roadmap

📚 UPSC Preparation — Year-wise & Class-wise Syllabus 📚 UPSC तयारी — वर्षनिहाय व इयत्तानिहाय अभ्यासक्रम

A structured 8-year journey from Class 1 to UPSC — click any year to expand full syllabus इयत्ता 1 पासून UPSC पर्यंत 8 वर्षांचा संरचित प्रवास — कोणत्याही वर्षावर क्लिक करा

1
Year 1 — Class 1 & 2
Foundation Building · Age 6–8
▼ click to expand
मराठी भाषा
बाराखडी, वाचन, लेखन, शब्द ओळख, सोप्या वाक्यांचे लेखन
गणित
संख्या 1–100, बेरीज, वजाबाकी, आकडेमोड, आकार ओळख
इंग्रजी
Alphabets, Simple words, Reading small sentences
सामान्य ज्ञान
माझे कुटुंब, शाळा, गाव, प्राणी, फळे, भाज्या
Computer Basics
Computer parts, Keyboard & Mouse, Basic typing
MMA Intro
Running, Stretching, Basic discipline, Body coordination
2
Year 2 — Class 3 & 4
Basic Competitive Awareness · Age 8–10
▼ click to expand
मराठी व्याकरण
नामे, सर्वनाम, क्रियापद, विशेषण, वाक्यप्रकार
गणित
गुणाकार, भागाकार, अपूर्णांक, वेळ, मोजमाप
इंग्रजी Grammar
Nouns, Verbs, Tenses, Simple sentences, Paragraph writing
सामान्य विज्ञान
सजीव-निर्जीव, अन्न-पाणी-हवा, सूर्य-चंद्र-तारे, वनस्पती
Scholarship तयारी
Scholarship/Navodaya pattern MCQ, Intelligence questions
Web Design
HTML tags, basic page structure, colors & fonts
3
Year 3 — Class 5 & 6
Scholarship + NMMS Level · Age 10–12
▼ click to expand
मराठी
उतारे वाचन, विरामचिन्हे, समास, अलंकार, निबंध लेखन
गणित
बीजगणित, भूमिती, शेकडेवारी, व्याज, वेग-काम
इंग्रजी
Comprehension, Letter writing, Vocabulary, Idioms
विज्ञान
बल, गती, विद्युत, प्रकाश, मानवी शरीर, पर्यावरण
इतिहास
प्राचीन भारत — सिंधू संस्कृती, वैदिक काळ, मौर्य साम्राज्य
C Language
Variables, Data types, Loops (for/while), Functions, Arrays
4
Year 4 — Class 7 & 8
Police / Talathi Level · Age 12–14
▼ click to expand
मराठी साहित्य
कविता विश्लेषण, कथा-कादंबरी, उतारे, जड शब्दार्थ, पत्रलेखन
गणित (Advanced)
त्रिकोणमिती, सांख्यिकी, आलेख, द्विघात समीकरण
इंग्रजी
Essay writing, Précis, Report, Active/Passive voice, Conditionals
इतिहास
मध्ययुगीन भारत, मराठा साम्राज्य, ब्रिटिश राजवट, स्वातंत्र्य चळवळ
भूगोल
भारताचा भूगोल, नद्या-पर्वत-मैदाने, हवामान, शेती, खनिजे
C++ / C#
OOP, Classes, Inheritance, File handling, Game development
5
Year 5 — Class 9 & 10
MPSC / NDA Foundation · Age 14–16
▼ click to expand
बुद्धिमत्ता
Series, Analogy, Coding-Decoding, Blood Relations, Puzzles, Direction
सामान्य अध्ययन 1
स्वातंत्र्योत्तर भारत, राज्यघटना, संसद, न्यायव्यवस्था, पंचायती राज
सामान्य अध्ययन 2
आर्थिक विकास, पंचवार्षिक योजना, कृषी, उद्योग, व्यापार
विज्ञान व तंत्रज्ञान
भौतिकशास्त्र, रसायनशास्त्र, जीवशास्त्र — MPSC/NDA स्तर
NDA तयारी
Mathematics, English, GK — NDA pattern + Physical fitness
JavaScript
DOM, Events, AJAX, APIs, Interactive web applications
6
Year 6 — Class 11 & 12
UPSC Prelims Foundation · Age 16–18
▼ click to expand
UPSC GS Paper 1
Indian History (Ancient-Medieval-Modern), Art & Culture, World History, Geography
UPSC GS Paper 2
Indian Constitution, Polity, Governance, IR, Social Justice
UPSC GS Paper 3
Economy, Agriculture, Environment, Science & Technology, Security
UPSC GS Paper 4
Ethics, Integrity, Aptitude — Case Studies, Public Service Values
CSAT Preparation
Comprehension, Logical Reasoning, Data Interpretation, Decision Making
Python
Data Science, Automation, AI tools, NumPy, Pandas, Machine Learning basics
7
Year 7 — Class 12 & Prelims Foundation
UPSC Prelims Foundation · Age 16–18
▼ click to expand
UPSC GS Paper 1
Indian History (Ancient–Medieval–Modern), Art & Culture, World History, Geography, Society
UPSC GS Paper 2
Indian Constitution, Polity, Governance, International Relations, Social Justice
UPSC GS Paper 3
Economy, Agriculture, Environment, Science & Technology, Security, Disaster Management
UPSC GS Paper 4
Ethics, Integrity, Aptitude — Case Studies, Public Service Values, Great Thinkers
CSAT Preparation
Comprehension, Logical Reasoning, Data Interpretation, Decision Making, Basic Maths
Python Programming
Data Science, Automation, AI tools, NumPy, Pandas, ML basics — Google/ISRO level
8
Year 8 — Post-12th / Degree Year 1
UPSC Prelims Ready · Age 18–19
▼ click to expand
Prelims Mock Tests
Full 100-question UPSC Prelims + CSAT pattern tests — AI evaluated with analysis
Current Affairs
PIB, The Hindu, Yojana, Kurukshetra — UPSC relevance focused, monthly compilation
Essay Writing (500 words)
Argument structure, Introduction-Body-Conclusion, short essays on current topics
MPSC Rajyaseva
Maharashtra GK, Marathi culture, economy, geography, local governance, Panchayati Raj
Optional Subject Intro
Geography / History / Political Science / Public Administration — subject selection
Coding Portfolio Project
Personal AI or Web project using Python/JavaScript — career portfolio ready
9
Year 9 — Degree Year 2
UPSC Mains Preparation · Age 19–20
▼ click to expand
UPSC Mains GS 1–4
Full depth 150 & 250 word answers — structuring, mind maps, flow charts
Essay Paper (1200 words)
Philosophical, Social, Economic, International topics — structured long essays
Optional Subject (Depth)
Complete optional subject — Paper 1 — 250 marks — full depth coverage
Previous Year Papers
10-year UPSC Prelims + Mains solved — model answers and AI-evaluated feedback
CBI / IB / ED Prep
Tier-1 Reasoning, English, GK — Tier-2 Advanced paper for Central Services
NDA Final Prep
Mathematics (12th level), English, GK — complete NDA pattern + physical fitness
10
Year 10 — Degree Year 3 & Interview
UPSC Final Stage · Age 20–21
▼ click to expand
Optional Subject Paper 2
Complete Optional Subject Paper 2 — 250 marks — revision + advanced topics
Interview Preparation (IAS)
DAF filling, Mock Interviews, Personality development, Current affairs discussion
Personality Development
Public speaking, Communication, Leadership, Group Discussion, Debate
Final Mock Test Series
Complete UPSC Prelims + Mains + Essay series — AI ranked performance tracking
Advanced AI Project
AI Chatbot / Data Dashboard / Automation tool — job-ready portfolio
Career Counselling
IAS/IPS/IFS/IRS selection, optional subject strategy, service allocation
📌 Syllabus evolves every year with new software & updated exam patterns 📌 दरवर्षी नवीन Software आणि अद्ययावत परीक्षा पॅटर्नसह अभ्यासक्रम बदलतो

Each year one new programming language is added. AI evaluation tools are upgraded continuously. Current affairs integrated throughout. दरवर्षी एक नवीन प्रोग्रामिंग भाषा जोडली जाते. AI मूल्यांकन साधने सतत अपग्रेड होतात. सर्व वर्षांमध्ये चालू घडामोडी समाकलित.

Class 1 to Class 10 · Building IAS-level thinking from childhood

1
Class 1
Awareness Foundation
Basic understanding of the surrounding world
  • ✦
    Language Development

    Moral Values
    Honesty · Cleanliness · Helping others

    Thinking Skills
    What, Where, Who · Basic puzzles
2
Class 2
Introduction to India
Knowing our nation and its identity
  • ✦

    Society

    Environment
    Importance of trees · Save water

    Observation Skills
    Identifying maps · Explaining information

Class 4
India & Constitution Basics
Freedom movement, civics and ethics

    Indian History
    Freedom movement · National leaders

    Civics
    What is Constitution · Duties of citizens
  • ✦
    Geography
    States of India · Climate
  • ✦
    Ethics
    Good leadership · Truth and courage
UPSC FOUNDATION

    Civics
    What is government · Panchayat system

    Economy Basics
    Money · Market systems
  • 🔥
    Current Awareness
    Two important news events per week
UPSC FOUNDATION
6

🤖 AI Integrated Curriculum
✨ Future-Ready Education

AI & Technology Programme at SVEMS

"Prepare children not just for today's jobs — but for jobs that don't yet exist."

At Swami Vivekananda English Medium School, Artificial Intelligence and Technology are not optional extras — they are woven into the daily curriculum from Nursery to Class 2. Every student learns to think computationally, use digital tools smartly, and understand the technology shaping their future.

AI
In Every Class
6+
Tech Subjects
New
Language/Year
100%
Digital Ready
The Why

Why AI Education from Class 1?

The world your child will work in will be shaped entirely by AI. Starting early is not optional — it is essential.

🚀

Future Job Market

By 2035, 85% of jobs that exist will require digital and AI literacy. Children who learn these skills early will have an enormous advantage in every career — from medicine to farming to civil services.

🧠

Computational Thinking

AI teaches children to break problems into steps, find patterns, and think logically. This computational thinking improves performance in Mathematics, Science, Language — every subject.

🌍

Global Competitiveness

Students in USA, Japan, South Korea learn coding from age 6. Our students must be equally equipped. SVEMS ensures no child from Kopargaon or Jeur Patoda is left behind in the global digital race.

🇮🇳

India's AI Mission

India's National Education Policy (NEP 2020) mandates coding from Class 6. SVEMS goes further — starting from Class 1. We align with India's vision of becoming a global AI superpower.

Complete Curriculum

AI & Technology Syllabus

A structured, age-appropriate programme from Class 1 to Class 10 — building from basics to advanced AI development

💻
Class 1 – 2

Computer Basics & Logical Thinking

Foundation Level · Digital Awareness

🖥️
Computer BasicsParts of computer (monitor, keyboard, mouse) · Start & shutdown · Basic typing practice · Drawing with Paint software · Safe use of technology
🧩
Logical ThinkingStep-by-step instructions · Algorithm concept · Pattern recognition · Simple puzzles · Keyboard practice · Introduction to block coding
🤖
What is AI?Introduction to Artificial Intelligence · AI in daily life (Alexa, Google) · Educational logic games · Fun AI experiments for kids
⚡
Class 3 – 4

Block Coding & Creative Programming

Scratch · Animations · Game Design

🎯
Basic Coding (Scratch)Block-based programming · Commands & sequences · Animations using coding blocks · Simple storytelling with code
🎮
Creative ProgrammingAdvanced block programming · Loops & conditions · Designing small games · Basic internet knowledge · Introduction to websites
🧠
Digital SkillsMS Office basics (Word, Paint) · Internet safety · Cyber hygiene · App literacy · Online communication basics
🌐
Class 5 – 6

Web Design — HTML, CSS & JavaScript

Build real websites · Digital Creativity

🏗️
HTML BasicsWhat is a website · Basic HTML structure · Headings & paragraphs · Images & links · Creating simple web pages
🎨
Web Design (CSS)Advanced HTML · Introduction to CSS · Colors, fonts & layouts · Simple website design · Basic JavaScript concept
📊
Google Workspace & MS OfficeGoogle Docs, Sheets, Slides · MS Office suite · Digital presentations · Spreadsheet basics · Collaborative tools
🐍
Class 7 – 8

Python Programming & Data Structures

Real coding · Problem Solving · Algorithms

⚙️
Python BasicsIntroduction to Python · Variables & data types · Input & output · Mathematical operations · Conditions & loops
🔬
Advanced ProgrammingPython loops & functions · Lists & dictionaries · File handling · Data structures basics · Small real-world projects
🧮
Algorithms & Intro to AISorting & searching algorithms · Introduction to Artificial Intelligence · Real-life examples of AI · Introduction to C++
Advanced Level
🤖
Class 9 – 10

AI, Machine Learning & Full Development

Python for AI · ML Basics · Web Development · C++

🤖
Python for AIAdvanced Python · Introduction to Machine Learning · Data & AI model concepts · Libraries: NumPy, Pandas · AI project building
🌍
Full Web DevelopmentHTML + CSS + JavaScript (complete) · Responsive design · Building multi-page websites · Intro to frameworks
⚡
C++ & AlgorithmsIntroduction to C++ · OOP concepts · Data structures (arrays, linked lists) · Advanced sorting & searching algorithms
🏆
Final Capstone ProjectStudents build a real AI / web project · Present to panel · Portfolio ready for college / career
📊
All Classes

AI-Powered Assessment

▸AI-generated personalised tests each term
▸Adaptive difficulty based on student performance
▸Instant feedback & learning gap analysis
▸Progress reports for parents every term
🌱
All Classes

Digital Ethics & Values

▸Responsible use of AI and internet
▸Cyber safety & privacy protection
▸Human values in the age of machines
▸Swami Vivekananda's teachings on technology & character
🏆 By Class 10, Every Student Will Have
✅ Built a working website ✅ Written Python programs ✅ Created an AI project ✅ Learnt C++ basics ✅ Career-ready digital portfolio
🤖

Give Your Child the Technology Advantage

AI is the future. Your child's future. Swami Vivekananda English Medium School ensures every student from Jeur Patoda and Kopargaon is equipped with the skills, confidence and knowledge to lead in the digital age.

50% Discount for Girl Students — From 1st Standardमुलींसाठी ५०% सवलत — पहिलीपासून

Girl students enrolled from 1st Standard onwards receive a 50% discount on annual fees — but only if the full fee is paid in one single instalment.पहिली इयत्तेपासून प्रवेश घेणाऱ्या मुलींना वार्षिक शुल्कावर ५०% सवलत मिळते — परंतु केवळ एकाच हप्त्यात संपूर्ण शुल्क भरल्यास.

📋 INSTALMENT POLICY
✓
1 Instalment (Full payment at once) — Girls from 1st Std get 50% discount · Pay ₹4,000 instead of ₹9,000
!
More than 1 Instalment — Full fee applies (₹8,000) · No discount available · Applicable to all students

* Applicable at Jeur Patoda and Ogadi branches from 1st Standard only. Pre-primary classes (Play Group, Nursery, LKG, UKG) are not eligible for the girls discount.

50%

Girls
Discount
1 instalment only

📋 Fee Payment Notes

✦Fees are to be paid at the time of admission for the academic year 2026–27.
✦50% discount for girl students is only valid when full annual fee is paid in one single instalment.
✦If fee is paid in more than one instalment, the full fee amount applies for all students including girls.
✦Girls discount is applicable from 1st Standard onwards only. Pre-primary classes are not covered.
✦Tapasya IAS Programme fee is included in the school fee for 1st and 2nd Standard students.
✦For any queries regarding fees, please contact the school office directly.

🔒 Change Admin Password
💡 How to update your website content
1️⃣ Login to Admin panel → ⚙️ Settings tab
2️⃣ Edit fee structure, school info, or password
3️⃣ Click Save — changes go to Google Sheet instantly
4️⃣ All receipts, summaries & fee calculations update automatically
✅ No need to edit HTML file or re-upload to GitHub!

🎬 Video Manager
Paste a Google Drive video share link to add it to the website
➕ Add New Video
In Google Drive: right-click video → Share → Copy link
📋 Current Videos on Website
Loading videos...
📌 How to add a video:
1. Open Google Drive → go to your video file
2. Right-click → Share → set to "Anyone with the link" → Copy link
3. Paste the link above, enter a title, click Add Video
4. Click 💾 Save & Publish — video appears on website immediately!

What Parents Sayपालक काय म्हणतात

Parent Testimonialsपालकांचे अभिप्राय

Trusted by families across Kopargaon, Jeur Patoda & Ahilyanagar Districtकोपरगाव, जेऊर पातोडा आणि अहिल्यानगर जिल्ह्यातील कुटुंबांचा विश्वास

✦
★★★★★
The Tapasya IAS Batch is truly remarkable. My son in Class 1 already knows India's map, national symbols and discusses current events. I have never seen this in any school before. The teachers are incredibly dedicated. तपस्या IAS बॅच खरोखरच उल्लेखनीय आहे. माझा मुलगा पहिल्या इयत्तेत असताना भारताचा नकाशा, राष्ट्रीय प्रतीके जाणतो. असे मी यापूर्वी कुठल्याच शाळेत पाहिले नाही.
R
Rajeshwari PatilParent · Class 1 Student · Jeur Patodaपालक · इयत्ता १ · जेऊर पातोडा
★★★★★
My daughter has transformed completely. She does yoga every morning, she loves Karate class, and her confidence in public speaking is incredible. The school's holistic approach is unmatched. माझी मुलगी पूर्णपणे बदलली आहे. ती दररोज योग करते, कराटे क्लास तिला आवडतो आणि तिचा आत्मविश्वास अप्रतिम आहे. शाळेचा सर्वांगीण दृष्टिकोन अतुलनीय आहे.
S
Sunita DeshpandeParent · UKG Student · Kopargaonपालक · UKG · कोपरगाव
★★★★★
As a girl child's parent, the 50% fee discount is a blessing. But beyond that, the AI syllabus and Vedic Maths teaching ensure my daughter gets world-class education. Very grateful to this school. मुलीच्या पालक म्हणून ५०% शुल्क सवलत एक वरदान आहे. त्याशिवाय, AI अभ्यासक्रम आणि वैदिक गणित माझ्या मुलीला दर्जेदार शिक्षण देतात. या शाळेचे खूप आभारी आहे.
A
Archana MoreParent · Nursery Student · Ogadiपालक · नर्सरी · ओगदी
★★★★★
The annual day performance of my child gave me tears of joy. Stage exposure from such a young age, singing, drama — these are things money cannot buy. Swami Vivekananda School does it all. माझ्या मुलाच्या वार्षिक स्नेहसंमेलनातील सादरीकरणाने माझ्या डोळ्यांत आनंदाश्रू आले. इतक्या लहान वयात व्यासपीठाचा अनुभव, गाणे, नाटक — हे पैशाने विकत घेता येत नाही.
M
Manoj GaikwadParent · LKG Student · Jeur Patodaपालक · LKG · जेऊर पातोडा
★★★★★
Health check-ups, smart teaching, friendly teachers — everything a parent wants is here. My son used to be shy, but after regular Karate and yoga, his personality has completely blossomed. 3rd year and still growing strong! आरोग्य तपासणी, स्मार्ट शिक्षण, मित्रत्वाचे शिक्षक — पालकाला हवे ते सगळे येथे आहे. माझा मुलगा लाजाळू होता, पण कराटे आणि योगानंतर त्याचे व्यक्तिमत्त्व फुलले आहे.
P
Priya JadhavParent · Class 2 Student · Kopargaonपालक · इयत्ता २ · कोपरगाव
